summary: Excellent audience recording captures a stellar 1990s show highlighted by Dark Star, Greatest Story > U.S. Blues, Truckin', and China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider.
review: All three reviewers rave about this concert as one of the best from the early ’90s, singling out a searing Dark Star, an epic Greatest Story > U.S. Blues to close set 1, and a second‑set flow that includes a smoking Truckin' and a sensational China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider. The audience recording is praised as “excellent” and very clear, making the performance easy to enjoy.

ai_rating.rationale: Three detailed 5‑star reviews consistently praise both the musical performance (standout songs, strong set flow) and the high‑quality audience recording.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers describe the audio as excellent and solid, indicating clear, well‑balanced capture despite being an audience source.

standout_songs: China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider
show_quality.setlist_flow: First set praised for a powerful opening and a climactic Greatest Story > U.S. Blues; second set described as “awesome” with seamless transitions and high energy throughout.
